title: Blue Archive: Problem Solver 68 Business Diary
titleEnglish: Blue Archive: Problem Solver 68 Business Diary
titleNative: ブルーアーカイブ 便利屋68業務日誌
synopsis: Welcome to Kivotos, the Academy City, where students spend their daily lives armed. Follow the lives of the four girls who run a business here as they take on all kinds of odd jobs just to keep it afloat. With the self-proclaimed Outlaw CEO, Rikuhachima Aru, at the helm, Problem Solver 68 is always ready to stir up a storm! Tag along with the crew on their misadventures in the long-awaited official Blue Archive spin-off manga! (Source: Kaiten Books)

titleRomaji: Tsuyokute New Game na Love Come
titleNative: つよくてニューゲームなラブコメ
synopsis: Komine is an ordinary grade-school kid who is at the top of his class. And for good reason - after dying, this is actually his second run at life. Knowing everything from upcoming class subjects to future events, Komine naturally excels at whatever he does. …and then there’s Sarara Miyano, Komine’s classmate. The last time he was in school, he was despised by her because of some foolish actions he took in the past. But now that he’s mentally older and wiser, maybe he can turn things around?

Explore the action taking place inside a cat’s body, in Cells at Work! style, while also seeing the perspective from the humans who provide a home and tender loving care. (Source: Kodansha USA)

So she tries to retaliate against him, which embarrasses her, but... it ends up making him happy, saying, "I'm so glad you think of me that much!" (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Seishiki ni Majo ni Natta Nidome no Akuyaku Oujo wa, Mou Futatabi to Taisetsu na Mono wo Ushinawanai to Kokoro ni Chikau @COMIC
titleRomaji: Seishiki ni Majo ni Natta Nidome no Akuyaku Oujo wa, Mou Futatabi to Taisetsu na Mono wo Ushinawanai to Kokoro ni Chikau @COMIC
titleNative: 正式に魔女になった二度目の悪役皇女は、もう二度と大切な者を失わないと心に誓う@COMIC
synopsis: Princess Alice, who was turned back to her 10-year-old self with the "witch's power" before she died, meets Theodore, a heretic (Nox). He is the most hated and shunned member of the Knights' Order, but for a girl who was killed because of her crimson hair, he is the only person who can share her loneliness! However, contrary to the rumors (of the past), she is intelligent and gets caught up in a battle over the right to inherit the throne...? "Would you like to become a witch's knight out of self-interest?" "That's a ridiculous invitation, I don't think you're a princess, is it?" A relife story of a figurehead princess and a lonely knight who finally meet, both of whom have "crimson"! (Source: TO Books, translated)

synonyms: The Two-Faced Heroine is Obsessed with Marking Me
Black Moonlight Heroine Always Wants to Mark Me
The Protagonist Of The Black Moon Always Wants To Mark Me
synopsis: A manipulative and calculating Alpha (Disguised as an Omega) × A cold-on-the-outside fearful Omega (Disguised as an Alpha)! When designer Gu Yu transmigrates into an ABO romance, she becomes the villain who will be killed by the protagonist, Su Yue. In order to survive, she decides to flatter the 'fragile Omega', creating stunning looks and helping her dominate showbiz. But Su Yue is not an Omega… she is an Alpha in disguise! And now, with intoxicating wine pheromones, she demands: 'Ready to be marked and be mine?'" (Source: Bilibili, translated)

title: This Villainess Just Wants to Take It Easy!I finally broke off the engagement, but now the second prince is totally stalking me!
titleRomaji: Akuyaku Reijou wa Slow Life wo Enjoy Shitai!: Yatto Konyaku Haki sareta noni, Daini Ouji ga Meccha Stalker Shitekurun desu kedo…
titleEnglish: This Villainess Just Wants to Take It Easy!I finally broke off the engagement, but now the second prince is totally stalking me!
titleNative: 悪役令嬢はスローライフをエンジョイしたい！～やっと婚約破棄されたのに、第二王子がめっちゃストーカーしてくるんですけど…～
synopsis: Finally, the moment she's been waiting for - her engagement annulment! At her graduation ceremony, villainess Sylvia is hit with the classic line from the crown prince: "I hereby annul our engagement!" To which Sylvia replies with a dazzling smile and an enthusiastic "Gladly!" Falsely accused of bullying her lover, Sylvia proves her innocence with a flawless alibi. She couldn't have bullied anyone while she was picking radishes in a dungeon! Armed with a hefty settlement for her troubles and her S-Rank adventurer's license, Sylvia retires to a quiet farm to finally live out her dream of taking it easy. But just as everything starts to go to plan, her ex-fiancé's younger brother, the second prince, shows up at her door suspecting treason and moves in with her, upending her easygoing life! A delightfully chaotic, sometimes wholesome, romantic adventure awaits! (Source: Magazine House, translated)

title: An Adventurer's Daily Grind at Age 29
titleEnglish: An Adventurer's Daily Grind at Age 29
titleNative: 29歳独身中堅冒険者の日常
synonyms: Everyday of the 29 years old single person adventurer.
synopsis: One day, while dungeon-diving for work, Hajime the adventurer encounters a starving girl named Rirui. The poor girl has been abandoned by her parents and has no relatives she can rely on. Unable to turn a blind eye, Hajime declares, "If you're gonna join my party, then stop crying!" So begins their life together...but as it turns out, Rirui is no ordinary little girl! (Source: K MANGA)

titleNative: 헌터는 조용히 살고 싶다
synonyms: The Hunter Wants to Live Quietly
synopsis: Life's never quiet when you've got S-Rank Rizz. Former S-Rank Hunter Ui-Jae, a.k.a. J, saved humanity from eldritch horrors emerging from dimensional rifts, only to time-leap 8 years into a future where he's presumed dead. Now a manager at a hangover soup joint, all J wants is a quiet life. But between selling off the relics of his past and catching the obsessive attention of Korea's #1 Hunter Sa-Yeong, peace isn't on the menu! (Source: Manta, edited)

title: Kimi no Yokogao shika Mirenai
titleNative: 君の横顔しか見れない
synopsis: The popular Fujimori Sachi never faces Kishimoto Arata, who sits next to her in class. No matter how hard Kishimoto tries to see her face, she brilliantly turns away from him. As a result, he has only ever seen her side profile. But she talks to him normally otherwise. This mysterious girl seems to have a secret...? A cute school romantic comedy about a girl who only shows her side profile VS a boy who won't give up ♪ Originally a web manga released on the author's Twitter account since May 7, 2019. Official serialization began in Comic Gene on August 16, 2020.

synopsis: "When I came home from my ex-lover's funeral and entered the room where we lived together, I saw a white butterfly fly out of the refrigerator..." Contains 16 short stories in which the everyday and the extraordinary, the human and the non-human, coexist. - Azayakana Danmen (鮮やかな断面) - Na Mo Naki Asa (名もなき朝) - Platform (プラットホーム) - Kuchisake-san (くちさけさん) - Lunch Time (ランチタイム) - Nikui Tsumasaki (憎い爪先) - Semi Shirazu (蝉しらず) - Ima wa Kagiri (いまはかぎり) - Katachi ga Onajinara (かたちが同じなら) - Mayonaka, Bakubaku to (真夜中、ばくばくと) - Yoru ni Tsutsumaru (夜に包まる) - Hour Time (アワータイム) - Tanin Yogari (他人よがり) - 365 Po no Koshin (365歩の行進) - Mokuyobi (もくようび)

titleRomaji: Houkago, Boku wa Kimi ni Naru
titleNative: 放課後、ぼくは君になる
synopsis: Akiba, a high school boy who is seriously into cross-dressing cosplay, devotes himself to emulating his "oshi." Then one day, while he was dressing up as his favorite character, all alone in the club room, he is discovered by Shibuya, a gorgeous gal that he has a crush on...? This is the start of a secret relationship between these two polar opposites! They will devote their youthful enthusiasm to a life of "oshi promotion"! (Source: Shonen Sirius, translated)

synonyms: Did You Think You Could Live Normally Even in a World with a 1:5 Male-to-Female Ratio?
synopsis: Having arrived in a world where the male-to-female ratio is 1:5, the man Shoto tries to live an ordinary life as he did in his previous world. However, he unknowingly causes many women to fall in love with him this way, and the women develop intense feelings for him. (Source: Natalie, translated)
